batches.title: Soft-Boiled Eggs (14 eggs)
steps: Bring large pot of salted water to rolling boil
Gently lower 14 large eggs into boiling water using a spoon
Cook exactly 6 minutes for soft-boiled (runny yolk, set white)
Remove eggs with slotted spoon into ice bath (3 minutes)
Store cooled eggs in their shells in fridge-safe container
Peel only on the day of serving for best texture
yields: 14 soft-boiled eggs, ready to reheat or peel

day_of_assembly.Monday: Breakfast — Boiled Egg with Sourdough, Cheese & Raspberries: Toast sourdough, top with Emmental, peel one egg into egg cup, serve with raspberries
day_of_assembly.Wednesday: Breakfast — Boiled Egg with Sourdough, Cheese & Raspberries: Toast sourdough, top with Emmental, peel one egg into egg cup, serve with raspberries
day_of_assembly.Friday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (eggs cooked is only safe ~4 day(s); this is day 5).
day_of_assembly.Sunday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (eggs cooked is only safe ~4 day(s); this is day 7).

storage.safety_note: Hard-boiled eggs: 1 week in shell, 5 days peeled in water. Scrambled/cooked dishes: 3–4 days.

batches.title: Mediterranean Grilled Chicken, Roasted Vegetables & Cooked Quinoa
steps: Combine 600g chicken breasts with 2 tbsp olive oil, 3 cloves minced garlic, 2 tsp dried oregano, 2 tsp dried thyme, juice of 1 lemon, salt & pepper; marinate 30 min at room temp
Preheat oven to 200°C and heat grill pan or skillet over medium-high heat
Grill marinated chicken 5–6 min per side until internal temp reaches 75°C; let rest 5 min, then slice into 180g portions
Toss 300g diced red peppers, 250g diced zucchini, 200g halved cherry tomatoes with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt & pepper on a baking sheet
Roast vegetables 25 min until tender and lightly caramelized
Cook 150g dry quinoa per package instructions (~20 min); fluff with fork, cool to room temp
Portion cooled chicken, vegetables, and quinoa separately into daily containers

day_of_assembly.Monday: Lunch — Mediterranean Grilled Chicken with Roasted Vegetables & Quinoa: Plate 180g (Diego) or 130g (Diana) chicken, add 100g or 75g roasted veg, 80g or 60g quinoa, dress with 1 tsp olive oil and lemon squeeze
day_of_assembly.Wednesday: Lunch — Mediterranean Grilled Chicken with Roasted Vegetables & Quinoa: Warm chicken briefly if desired, plate 180g (Diego) or 130g (Diana), add roasted veg and quinoa, dress with olive oil and lemon
day_of_assembly.Friday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (poultry is only safe ~3 day(s); this is day 5).

storage.safety_note: Cool quickly; never leave poultry at room temp > 2 h. Reheat to 74 °C through.

batches.title: Greek Yogurt Portioned with Nuts & Berries Setup
steps: Remove 600g Greek yogurt 0% from fridge (6 × 100g for daily portions)
Portion yogurt into 7 small glass containers or bowls (170g Diego / 130g Diana per day)
Store containers in fridge with lids or plastic wrap
Keep walnuts and blueberries separate; assemble only on the day of serving for crispness
Measure out daily nut and berry portions into small prep containers for quick assembly
yields: 7 × pre-portioned Greek yogurt containers (170g Diego, 130g Diana)
Walnuts and blueberries ready to portion

day_of_assembly.Monday: Pm Snack — Greek Yogurt with Walnuts & Blueberries: Top 170g (Diego) or 130g (Diana) pre-portioned yogurt with 20g walnuts and 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) blueberries
day_of_assembly.Tuesday: Pm Snack — Greek Yogurt with Walnuts & Blueberries: Top pre-portioned yogurt with fresh walnuts and blueberries (per member portions)
day_of_assembly.Wednesday: Pm Snack — Greek Yogurt with Walnuts & Blueberries: Add 20g walnuts and 80g blueberries (Diego) or 15g/60g (Diana) to pre-portioned yogurt
day_of_assembly.Thursday: Pm Snack — Greek Yogurt with Walnuts & Blueberries: Top yogurt portion with walnuts and fresh blueberries
day_of_assembly.Friday: Pm Snack — Greek Yogurt with Walnuts & Blueberries: Assemble pre-portioned yogurt with nuts and berries per daily targets
day_of_assembly.Saturday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (dairy is only safe ~5 day(s); this is day 6).
day_of_assembly.Sunday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (dairy is only safe ~5 day(s); this is day 7).

storage.container: sealed original packaging or airtight container
storage.safety_note: Check use-by date on packaging. Opened yogurt: 5–7 days.

batches.title: Poached Chicken with Ginger-Soy Sauce & Sesame Bok Choy
steps: Fill large pot with 2 L water, add 2 tbsp low-sodium soy sauce, 2 slices fresh ginger, 2 bay leaves; bring to simmer
Add 600g chicken breasts; simmer gently 15–18 min until internal temp 75°C (do not boil vigorously)
Remove chicken to cutting board, cool 5 min, then shred into bite-sized pieces; store in fridge
For sauce: whisk together 3 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tsp sesame oil, 1 tbsp grated fresh ginger, 2 cloves minced garlic
Toss shredded chicken with sauce; divide into daily portions, store in sealed containers
Blanch 400g bok choy in boiling salted water for 2 min until tender-crisp; drain, cool, toss with 1 tsp sesame oil and 1 tbsp sesame seeds
Store bok choy in separate sealed container
yields: 6 tbsp ginger-soy sauce (2 tbsp per serving)

day_of_assembly.Tuesday: Lunch — Asian Chicken Lettuce Cups with Sesame Bok Choy: Arrange 4–5 butter lettuce leaves, fill each with 100g (Diego) or 75g (Diana) sauced chicken, top with 80g (Diego) or 60g (Diana) bok choy, garnish with carrot and sesame seeds
day_of_assembly.Thursday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (poultry is only safe ~3 day(s); this is day 4).

storage.safety_note: Cool quickly; never leave poultry at room temp > 2 h. Reheat to 74 °C through.

batches.title: Spiced Turkey Meatballs, Brown Lentils & Roasted Beets
steps: Preheat oven to 190°C and line a baking sheet with parchment
Mix 600g ground turkey with 40g wholegrain breadcrumbs, 1 egg, 2 cloves minced garlic, 1 tsp paprika, 1 tsp cumin, salt & pepper in a bowl
Form 20 meatballs (~30g each); arrange on baking sheet
Bake 15 min until internal temp 75°C; cool slightly, store in sealed container
Cook 150g dry brown lentils per package (~25 min); drain, cool, set aside
Toss 400g diced fresh beets with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, pepper; spread on separate baking sheet; roast at 200°C for 25 min until tender
Prepare salad: combine cooked lentils, cooled roasted beets, 200g diced cucumber, 1 tbsp balsamic vinegar, 1 tbsp olive oil, 20g fresh parsley, salt & pepper
Divide lentil-beet salad and meatballs into daily portions
yields: 20 baked turkey meatballs (5–6 per serving, ~160g Diego / 4–5 per serving ~120g Diana)

day_of_assembly.Wednesday: Dinner — Spiced Turkey Meatballs with Brown Lentil Salad & Roasted Beets: Warm 5–6 meatballs (Diego) or 4–5 (Diana) in oven 3 min; plate on bed of 150g (Diego) or 110g (Diana) lentil-beet salad, drizzle with extra balsamic and fresh parsley
day_of_assembly.Thursday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (poultry is only safe ~3 day(s); this is day 4).

storage.safety_note: Cool quickly; never leave poultry at room temp > 2 h. Reheat to 74 °C through.

batches.title: Mexican-Style Cumin Chicken, Black Beans, Brown Rice & Roasted Peppers
steps: Combine 500g chicken breasts with juice of 1 lime, 1 tbsp cumin, 1 tsp paprika, 3 cloves minced garlic, 1 tbsp olive oil, salt & pepper; marinate 30 min
Heat grill pan or skillet over medium-high heat; grill chicken 5–6 min per side until internal temp 75°C; rest 5 min, slice into strips
Heat 1 tsp olive oil in separate pan; sauté 150g diced bell peppers 5 min, cool and store
Cook 120g dry black beans per package instructions (~25 min); drain, toss with 0.5 tsp cumin, juice of 0.25 lime, salt & pepper; cool
Cook 120g dry brown rice per package instructions (~18 min); fluff and cool
Portion grilled chicken, beans, peppers, and rice separately into daily containers

day_of_assembly.Saturday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (poultry is only safe ~3 day(s); this is day 6).
day_of_assembly.Sunday: ⚠ Cook fresh today — do NOT use the Sunday batch (poultry is only safe ~3 day(s); this is day 7).

storage.safety_note: Cool quickly; never leave poultry at room temp > 2 h. Reheat to 74 °C through.
